scope: Fixture-valid Kernel-local coverage index. This is not target-project evidence.

source_policy.official_docs_policy: Official Elementor documentation proves documented Elementor capability only.
source_policy.workbook_policy: EV4-Workbook-Jinja may identify educational coverage areas but is never official Elementor truth.

required_doc_areas.title: Get started with Elementor Editor V4
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Activation and version prerequisites are context for project evidence, not a core element decision card.
required_limitations: Version and activation docs do not prove the target WordPress project has Editor V4 enabled.

required_doc_areas.title: Explore the V4 features / Atomic Elements
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Atomic element discovery and panel grouping are editor context, not a separate MVK core element card.
required_limitations: Atomic icon and V4 Elements category do not prove target project availability.

required_doc_areas.title: Prioritize conflicting styles
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Class priority affects class governance and mutation safety; it is not an element selection card.
required_limitations: Class priority docs do not approve class mutation in a target project.

required_doc_areas.title: The Elementor Editor Class Manager
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Class Manager is governance context for class ordering and cleanup, not a core element card.
required_limitations: Class Manager docs do not prove current user permission or safe mutation.

required_doc_areas.title: User roles and classes
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Permission boundaries constrain project evidence and class mutation, not element selection.
required_limitations: Official role docs do not prove the current target user role.

required_doc_areas.title: Responsive editing
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Responsive inheritance is a runtime/Responsive boundary, not a core element card.
required_limitations: Responsive inheritance documentation is not browser/runtime validation.

required_doc_areas.title: Reset style settings
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Reset behavior is a control-level documentation issue, not an element card.
required_limitations: Reset behavior requires reconciliation with V3/V4 differences docs before hard UI-path claims.
source_quality_notes: Reset style settings and V3/V4 differences docs should be rechecked together before claims about reset-to-default behavior.

required_doc_areas.title: Variables Manager
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Variable management is design-system context, not an MVK core element card.
required_limitations: Variable docs do not prove target variable inventory or Elementor Pro availability.

required_doc_areas.title: Components
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Components are reusable design-system blocks and dependency boundaries, not one of the eight MVK core element cards.
required_limitations: Components requirements do not prove active Elementor Pro license, Admin permission, or target availability.

required_doc_areas.title: Dynamic Tags in V4
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Dynamic data availability depends on target WordPress data sources, not core element selection.
required_limitations: Dynamic tag docs do not prove target data source availability.

required_doc_areas.title: Interactions
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Interactions affect behavior and runtime evidence; they are not core element-selection cards.
required_limitations: Interaction docs do not prove Builder execution or observed runtime behavior.

required_doc_areas.title: Nested links
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Nested links are a topology constraint used by existing Button/container cards, not a separate element card.
required_limitations: Nested-link docs prove editor restriction only, not Builder execution or runtime click validation.

required_doc_areas.title: Differences between Elementor Editor V3 and V4
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: V3/V4 compatibility is project/page context, not a core element card.
required_limitations: V3/V4 differences do not prove target page compatibility.

required_doc_areas.title: Viewport control
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Viewport control constrains responsive evidence and screenshots, not core element selection.
required_limitations: Viewport control docs are not complete breakpoint semantics and do not prove runtime behavior across actual devices.
